properties.fouling_epibionts_desc: Some barnacles on carapace. Thick layer of algae covering entire body.
properties.alive_and_rescued_notes: Turtle dry docked overnight by TITR awaiting transport to AZWH Monday.

properties.injury_desc: Crack in top left side of carapace, undetermined if occurred pre-mortem or due to decomposition.
PREDATED FLIPPERS AND HEAD MISSING CARAPACE ONLY.

properties.fouling_epibionts_desc: Lots of small barnacles particularly around the head, neck, and front flippers
Heavy coverage of algae and large/small barnacles on carapace.
Heavy load of barnacles and green algae on carapace and plastron
properties.alive_and_rescued_notes: dry docked overnight awaiting transport on 1/6/26

properties.fouling_epibionts_desc: Moderate algal coverage on carapace and plastron. Moderate barnacle coverage on carapace.
properties.injury_desc: Fresh scratch on plastron. Healed injury to left rear carapace scutes from flipper to tail area.
properties.alive_and_rescued_notes: Kept warm and in shallow water - brought off-island Wednesday and transported to AWH Thursday

properties.fouling_epibionts_desc: Low barnacle load on carapace and head.
properties.crab_pot_additional_info: No weights, ropes, floats or ID. Hole in side of pot large enough for turtle to enter by. Discussed with Fisheries officer - pot removed from beach for collection from volunteers address ( known to fisheries officer).

properties.injury_desc: Old boat strike injury on back of carapace.
properties.alive_and_rescued_notes:
Found beached, with:

Boat strike trauma over caudal spine, coelomic gas and lung lobe collapse
Mildly/poorly regenerative anaemia - flukes vs previous trauma
Alkalosis

properties.fouling_epibionts_desc: Low barnacle load on carapace and plastron
properties.injury_desc: Fresh injuries on plastron and head from rocks.

properties.fouling_epibionts_desc: Large barnacles on top of carapace and a little algae.
properties.alive_and_rescued_notes: Found on mudflats and not responsive, had some large barnacles on carapace.

properties.fouling_epibionts_desc: Barnacles and lots of green alage

properties.injury_desc: Missing part of left front flipper
No flesh is visible, all limbs and head are missing
